narration: The iron in your blood? It was forged in a dying star.
visual_description: Hook visual: The iron in your blood? It was forged in a dying star.

narration: Stellar nucleosynthesis happens inside stars, where lighter elements fuse into heavier ones.
visual_description: Context visual: Stellar nucleosynthesis happens inside stars, where lighter elements fuse into heavier ones.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Stellar nucleosynthesis happens inside stars, where lighter elements fuse into heavier ones.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Stellar nucleosynthesis happens inside stars, where lighter elements fuse into heavier ones.

narration: But when these stars explode as supernovae, they scatter these elements across the universe.
visual_description: Escalation visual: But when these stars explode as supernovae, they scatter these elements across the universe.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: But when these stars explode as supernovae, they scatter these elements across the universe.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: But when these stars explode as supernovae, they scatter these elements across the universe.

narration: That’s right! Elements like iron, carbon, and oxygen all originate from these cosmic events.
